settings_appearance_agentDesc: Customize the mascot image shown for each AI agent. Choose a built-in GIF or upload your own image.
settings_notif_desc: Get notified when tasks complete, fail, or need your attention.
settings_notif_enabledDesc: Allow MiWarp to send system notifications
settings_notif_minDurationDesc: Only notify for tasks longer than this
settings_notif_feishuDesc: Send task completion notifications to a Feishu group chat via webhook.
settings_notif_feishuEnabledDesc: Post to Feishu webhook when tasks or scheduled jobs complete
settings_notif_feishuTestBodyWithMascot: Feishu webhook test from MiWarp · mascot: {mascot}
settings_notif_feishuTriggersDesc: Choose which events trigger Feishu notifications. Leave unchecked to notify on all events.
settings_notif_feishuCardImgKeyPh: e.g. img_v2_… from Feishu image upload API
settings_notif_feishuCardImgKeyHint:
Feishu interactive cards show a full-width picture using an elements[] block with tag "img", required "img_key", and mode "fit_horizontal" (see Image component docs). Obtain image_key from the upload-image API.
Image component: https://open.feishu.cn/document/ukTMukTMukTM/uUjNwUjL1YDM14SN2ATN
Upload image API: https://open.feishu.cn/document/uAjLw4CM/ukTMukTMukTM/reference/im-v1/image/create
Title-area icons use header.icon.img_key (small), not a full-width cover: https://open.feishu.cn/document/ukTMukTMukTM/ukTNwUjL5UDM14SO1ATN
If img_key is set here, it takes priority over the mascot preset below.
settings_notif_feishuCardMascotHint: Used only when Card cover (img_key) is empty. Inserts a Markdown image with a public CodeIsland GIF URL; Feishu may block some hosts. For a reliable full-width cover, use img_key above.
settings_general_modeCliHelp: Uses the claude CLI with your OAuth login or subscription.
settings_general_modeApiHelp: Direct API access with your own key. Supports Anthropic and compatible endpoints.
settings_general_modeAutoHelp: Tries claude CLI first, falls back to API key if not available.
settings_general_baseUrlHelp: Leave empty for official Anthropic API. Set for proxies or OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
settings_general_modelsHelp: Sonnet is required — if empty, Opus and Haiku are ignored. Opus / Haiku inherit Sonnet when empty. All empty = provider defaults.
settings_general_extraEnvHelp: Injected into CLI process. Paste KEY=value lines or JSON to bulk-add.
settings_local_setupHint_ccswitch: Open CC Switch → Settings → enable "Proxy Enabled", then select a provider
settings_local_setupHint_ccr: Run "ccr start" to start the router only (do NOT use "ccr code"). Install: npm i -g @musistudio/claude-code-router
settings_local_setupHint_ollama: Run "ollama serve" to start the Ollama service
settings_apiTest_partial: Auth OK ({latency}ms) — configure a model for full test
settings_general_setupWizardDesc: Re-run the initial setup wizard to reconfigure CLI and authentication.
settings_general_webAccessDesc: Choose who can connect to the web server
settings_general_webTunnelDesc: Paste your tunnel URL (ngrok, cloudflared, etc). CORS and access link update automatically.
settings_general_webTunnelInvalid: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://
settings_general_webAllowedOriginsDesc: Additional CORS origins. Tunnel URL is included automatically.
settings_showTokenReportDesc: Show input/output/cache token statistics at the end of each conversation
processVisibility_desc: Control how much of the agent's working process MiWarp shows.
processVisibility_outputDesc: Final replies and essential summaries only — like a simple chat.
processVisibility_guidedDesc: Key steps and one-line tool summaries — a lightweight activity trail.
processVisibility_developerDesc: Collapsible tool cards, thinking blocks, and file changes — everyday development.
processVisibility_expertDesc: Full tool payloads, traces, and debugging detail.
settings_general_webOriginInvalid: Must start with http:// or https://
settings_general_webApplyWarning: Applying will briefly restart the server.
settings_general_webSaveWarning: Server started, but settings were not saved. Changes may be lost on next launch.
settings_general_webLanIpFailed: Unable to auto-detect LAN IP — VPN or multiple network adapters may interfere. Enter your computer's IP in the browser manually.
settings_general_displayLanguageDesc: Choose the language for the app interface
settings_general_uiZoomDesc: Adjust the overall size of the interface
settings_defaultSessionModeDesc: Multi-worktree uses an isolated branch per session. Single-branch shares the current workspace branch. “Ask each new session” shows a dialog when you start a new session to choose between them.
settings_newSessionWorktreeConfirm:
Use multi-worktree for this new session (isolated branch)?

OK = Multi-worktree
Cancel = Single branch (shared workspace branch)
settings_autoCommitDesc: Automatically commit all changes when a worktree session finishes
settings_autoPRDesc: Create a PR automatically after auto-committing
settings_autoCleanupWorktreeDesc: Remove worktree directory when session is deleted
settings_cliConfig_footer: Changes saved to ~/.claude/settings.json. Project overrides (.claude/settings.json) take precedence.
settings_cliConfig_thinkingModeDesc: Enable extended thinking for complex problems
settings_cliConfig_fastModeDesc: Use faster output (same model, reduced latency)
settings_cliConfig_autoCompactDesc: Automatically compact context when approaching limits
settings_cliConfig_fileCheckpointsDesc: Create file checkpoints for undo/rewind support
settings_cliConfig_verboseDesc: Show detailed tool output and debug info
settings_cliConfig_permissionModeDesc: Default permission mode for new sessions
settings_cliConfig_responseLangDesc: Preferred language for AI responses (e.g. en, zh, ja)
settings_cliConfig_spinnerTipsDesc: Show tips while waiting for responses
settings_cliConfig_codeDiffFooterDesc: Show code diff summary in footer
settings_cliConfig_prStatusFooterDesc: Show PR status in footer bar
settings_remote_desc: Run Claude Code on remote machines via SSH. Requires key-based authentication.
settings_remote_forwardKeyWarning: API key will be visible in process list (ps) on the remote machine. Consider configuring the key directly in remote ~/.claude/settings.json instead.
settings_remote_sshKeyPubMissing: Public key missing. Run this command in terminal to rebuild:
settings_remote_sshKeyPubMissing_win: Public key missing. Run this command in PowerShell to rebuild:
settings_remote_sshKeyCopyCmd: Run this command in terminal to install the key:
settings_remote_sshKeyCopyCmd_win: Run this command in PowerShell to install the key:
settings_remote_sshKeySuccess: Passwordless login works! Key path has been auto-filled.
settings_remote_sshKeyFailed: Connection failed. Run the command above in terminal first, then retry.
settings_remote_sshKeyFailed_win: Connection failed. Run the command above in PowerShell first, then retry.
settings_remote_cliNotFoundHint: SSH connected but CLI not found. Run this on the remote machine to find the path:
settings_remote_cliNotFoundHint2: Then paste the full path into "Claude CLI Path (remote)" above and test again.
settings_debug_maxEntries: Logs are buffered in memory (max 2000 entries). Open DevTools Console to see live output.
sidebar_pluginsNavHint: Jump to a section on this page (URL stays in sync).
sidebar_selectProjectBrowse: Select a project to browse files.
sidebar_selectProjectGit: Select a project to view git status.
sidebar_startTeamHint: Start a team in Claude Code
sidebar_deleteDesc: Choose how to delete this conversation. Soft delete hides it but keeps data on disk. Hard delete permanently removes all data.
sidebar_createFolderDesc: Create a new folder to organize your sessions.
sidebar_deleteFolderDesc: Delete folder "{name}"? Choose whether to keep the sessions (moved to uncategorized) or delete them too.
sidebar_removeProjectDesc: This project will be removed from sidebar. Data is kept on disk. Use {openFolder} to add it back.
statusbar_islandRegion: Session status bar. Hover or expand to show path, session id, and usage.
statusbar_contextTitle: Context usage for the latest turn ({pct}% of {tokens} tokens). The CLI automatically compacts context when approaching the limit.
statusbar_rewindTitle: Rewind: undo file changes from this session
statusbar_forkTitle: Fork: new session from summarized context
statusbar_endTitle: End the session (process will be killed)
statusbar_cliVersionTitle: Claude CLI v{version} — Click to view release notes
prompt_permAutoReadDesc: Auto-approve file edits, ask for others
prompt_pendingPermission: Handle the pending approval above first...
prompt_clipboardUnsupported: File paste is not yet supported on this platform
chat_eventSystemFailed: Event system failed to initialize. Some features may not work.
chat_orTypeToStart: or type a message below to start a new chat
chat_typeToStart: Type a message below to start
chat_welcomeTitle: What can MiWarp help you build?
chat_welcomeSubtitle: Choose a project, describe a task, or continue your last session.
chat_quickAnalyzePrompt: Analyze the current project structure. Explain the main modules, how to start/build, key files, and potential risks.
chat_quickFixPrompt: Based on the issue I describe next, first analyze the root cause and propose a fix plan. Wait for my confirmation before making any changes.
chat_quickDailyPrompt: Based on the current project's recent changes, git status, and key files, generate a brief project daily report.
chat_forkedBanner: This session was forked from a previous conversation.
chat_typeToStartSession: Type a message below to start the session
chat_startSessionHint: Start a session with an AI coding agent
chat_forkingDesc: Creating a new session from summarized context...
chat_contextCleared: Context cleared — messages above are no longer visible to the AI
chat_clearNotSupported: Clear is only supported in stream mode
chat_clearSessionBusy: Wait for the current response to complete before clearing
plugin_desc: Extend Claude with specialized knowledge and behavior
plugin_editorScopeProjectDesc: Only available in the current workspace
plugin_deleteSkillMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This removes the entire skill directory.
plugin_skillRestartHint: Start a new session to use it.
plugin_uninstallMsg: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"?
plugin_removeMarketplaceMsg: Are you sure you want to remove the "{name}" marketplace?
plugin_loadFailed: Failed to load plugin data. Check the debug console for details.
plugin_couldNotLoad: Could not load: {items}. Some sections may show incomplete data.
plugin_noSkillsFound: No skills found. Try a different search term.
plugin_noContentPreview: No SKILL.md content available for preview.
plugin_skillsEmptyDesc: Skills give Claude specialized knowledge and behavior for specific tasks.
plugin_mcpDesc: Model Context Protocol servers for tool access
plugin_pluginsDesc: Browse, install, and manage plugin packages
plugin_noPluginsMatch: No plugins match your search criteria. Try a different query or category.
plugin_addMarketplaceHint: Add a marketplace in Claude Code to browse plugins.
plugin_installFromMarketplace: Install plugins from the Marketplace to see them here.
plugin_noMarketplaces: No marketplaces registered. Use the input above to add a marketplace source.
plugin_scopeProjectNote: Plugin will be installed in the current project directory
plugin_installationSuccessNote: {name} has been installed and is ready to use.
team_emptyDesc: Team Monitor shows Claude Code native teams (from ~/.claude/teams/). For group chat, use Team Chat. For task dispatch, use Team Runs.
team_selectTeam: Select a team from the sidebar
teamRun_dispatchDesc: Send this task to a team of specialists instead of a single Claude session.
teamRun_presetFullstackDesc: Architecture, frontend, backend, and testing — 4 specialists
teamRun_presetReviewDesc: Security, performance, and maintainability review — 3 reviewers
teamRun_presetResearchDesc: Research, codebase scan, and solution synthesis — 3 specialists
teamRun_chatDesc: Discuss ideas, risks, and next steps with your team like a group chat.
teamRun_runsDesc: Dispatch clear tasks to your team, track progress and results.
teamRun_monitorDesc: View team members, inbox, and underlying state.
teamRun_chatPlaceholder: Discuss plans, risks, or next steps with the team...
teamRun_chatEngineNotReady: Team chat engine is not yet enabled. Use @team in Chat to dispatch tasks, or click "Dispatch as Task" below.
teamRun_roomEmpty: No messages in this room yet. Send a note below, or wait for inbox updates from agents.
teamRun_roomAvatarHint: GIF avatars: add static/team-avatars/{member-slug}.gif (PNG also works), using a slug from the member name.
teamRun_teamHint: Looks like you want to use a team. Prefix with @team, or click "Dispatch to Team".
teamRun_emptyDesc: No team runs yet. Type @team in Chat, or click "Dispatch to Team" on a message.
teamRun_selectRun: Select a team run to view details
usage_firstLoadMessage: First load requires scanning historical session data, please wait... Subsequent loads will be much faster
usage_noUsageData: No usage data yet. Start a session to see usage statistics.
history_subtitle: Browse and search your AI coding sessions
history_searchSemanticTooltip: Semantic search uses AI to understand meaning — coming soon
history_totalCost: total cost (MiWarp runs & imported CLI sessions only)

explorer_saveDisabledInPreview: Switch to Edit mode to save
release_updateCliHint: Runs the official CLI self-update. If you installed via Homebrew, WinGet, or npm, use those package managers instead — see the docs.
release_updateSuccessShort: Update finished. Restart Claude Code if a session is open.
release_cliNotDetected: CLI not detected in PATH — use the guide to install or update.

runs_adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search or filters
runs_noFavoritesHint: Star a prompt in Search to save it here

MiWarp Desktop v0.1.0

infoPanel_noInfo: Session info will appear after the session starts.
contextPanel_noData: Context data will appear after the first turn.
slashMenu_fastDesc: High-speed Opus 4.6. Billed as extra usage at a premium rate.
setup_cliNotFoundDesc: Install it in your terminal using one of these commands:

setup_winRecheckHint: Requires Git for Windows. If still not detected after install, please restart the app and try again
setup_authDesc: Choose how to authenticate with Claude.
setup_completeBrowser: Complete the authorization in your browser, then return here.
setup_noKeyNeeded: No key needed for local inference.
setup_allSetDesc: Everything is configured. Let's start coding.
setup_networkFailDesc: Could not reach the API endpoint. This may be due to network restrictions.
setup_networkTipProxy: Configure a proxy: set HTTPS_PROXY or HTTP_PROXY environment variable
setup_networkTipVPN: Try using a VPN or switching networks
setup_networkTipMirror: Use a custom API base URL if you have a mirror endpoint

chat_cliChannelSwitched: Update channel set to {channel}. CLI will update on next restart.
chat_cliChannelDisabledHint: Only takes effect on new sessions
chat_initHintDesc: Run /init to help Claude understand your codebase. This creates a CLAUDE.md file with project documentation.
plan_approvalDesc: Claude has written a plan and is ready to execute. How would you like to proceed?
plan_cannotRebuild: Unable to reconstruct the full plan. Scroll up to view the relevant changes.
auth_cliPriorityHint: When both Login and API Key are present, CLI prioritizes API Key
settings_auth_modeCliDesc: CLI manages authentication (Login or configured API Key)
settings_auth_modeAppDesc: App manages authentication (injects env var when starting CLI)
settings_auth_cliLoginDesc: Stored in macOS Keychain via claude login.
settings_auth_appApiKeyDesc: Managed by App, injected as environment variable when starting CLI.
error_guidance_context_limit: The conversation context is too large. Try forking to start fresh with a summary.
error_guidance_budget_limit: Budget limit reached. Adjust max_budget_usd in settings to continue.
error_guidance_auth_issue: Authentication failed. Check your API key or login status in settings.
error_guidance_server_issue: Temporary server issue. Wait a moment and retry.
error_guidance_session_timeout: The session timed out waiting for a response. This may be caused by a pending permission prompt, slow API, or unresponsive MCP server. Try resuming or starting a new chat.
error_guidance_tool_issue: A tool encountered an error. Check the tool output for details.
error_guidance_unknown: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or dismiss.
screenshot_notSupported: Screenshot capture is only supported on macOS
cliSync_noSessions: No CLI sessions found for this project
cliSync_usageIncomplete: Some usage data could not be reconstructed
cliSync_usageIncompleteHint: Usage data incomplete — imported from CLI
toast_remoteHostMissing: Remote host no longer in settings — target reset to local
toast_permissionPersistFailed: Mode active for this session only — save failed
toast_permissionChangeFailed: Permission mode change failed — save error
error_rewindNoCheckpoint: No file checkpoint found to rewind to
rewind_selectCheckpoint: Select a checkpoint to rewind to:
rewind_noCheckpoints: No checkpoints available in this session.
rewind_noCheckpointsHint: Checkpoints are created when messages are sent. Older sessions may not have them.
rewind_previewDesc: The following files will be reverted:
rewind_checkpointUnavailable: This checkpoint is no longer available.
rewind_previewUnavailable: Preview is not available. You can still proceed with the rewind.
rewind_degradedToFull: Selective rewind not supported — all files reverted
rewind_noSession: No active session. Start a conversation first.
rewind_sessionEnded: Session has ended. Rewind is only available during active sessions.
rewind_sessionBusy: Cannot rewind while the session is running. Wait for the current turn to finish.
doctor_projectSkipped: No project directory — project-scope checks skipped
hooks_desc: Shell commands and prompts that run at specific lifecycle events
hooks_noHooksDesc: Hooks let you run commands or prompts at lifecycle events like PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.
hooks_deleteGroupMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this hook group?
hooks_matcherPlaceholder: Tool name pattern (e.g. Bash, Read, Write)
hooks_matcherHelp: Optional: only trigger for matching tool names. Leave empty to match all.
hooks_mcpServerPlaceholder: Name of configured MCP server (e.g. context7)
hooks_mcpToolPlaceholder: Name of the tool on that server (e.g. resolve-library-id)
hooks_mcpInputHelp: Arguments as JSON object. String values support ${path} interpolation from hook input (e.g. ${tool_input.file_path}).
hooks_promptPlaceholder: Prompt to send to the model...
hooks_modelPlaceholder: Model to use for prompt hooks...
hooks_editWarning: Editing rebuilds handler config. Custom fields added manually may be lost.
slashTasks_empty: No background tasks in this session.
chat_addDirSaved:
Directory added: {path}
(will be included on next session start)
chat_addDirUnsupported: add-dir is only supported for Claude agent
skillSelector_empty: No skills found. Add skills in .claude/skills/ to get started.

agent_noPluginAgentsDesc: Install plugins that include agent definitions.
agent_memory_hint: Memory file path or glob pattern (e.g. MEMORY.md)
agent_deleteConfirm: Delete agent "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
agent_saved: Agent saved. Changes take effect on next session start.
agent_created: Agent created. Changes take effect on next session start.
agent_changesNextSession: Changes take effect on next session start.
agent_nameConflict: Name conflicts with a built-in agent.
agent_renameConflict: An agent with that file name already exists.
agent_nameFormat: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
appUpdate_upToDate: You are already on the latest version (v{version}).
appUpdate_checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
preview_invalidUrl: Enter a valid http:// or https:// URL
preview_openFailed: Could not connect — make sure a local server is running at this address
preview_cookieHint: Session and cookies are kept for this preview so sites like Feishu can stay signed in
preview_resetSession: Clear this preview's browsing data and reload it
preview_desktopOnly: The embedded preview is only available in the desktop app.
preview_switchHint: Switch back to the Preview tab to continue the current web session.
preview_resetFailed: Failed to clear preview session data
preview_emptyTitle: Enter a URL to start preview
preview_emptyHint: Start a local dev server, then enter its address above or pick a quick port below.
workflow_busy: The current session is still running. Wait before executing another workflow step.
workflow_emptyStepPrompt: This workflow step does not have an executable prompt
workflow_startFromTemplate: Select a template to start a workflow
workflow_fillPromptFirst: Please fill in the prompt or confirm the action first
wf_fullstack_desc: Frontend + Backend + Database complete development flow
wf_fullstack_step1_instruction: Analyze user requirements, define feature scope and tech stack
wf_fullstack_step2_instruction: Design database schema, API structure, and project directory
wf_fullstack_step4_instruction: Implement UI components and user interactions
wf_fullstack_step5_instruction: End-to-end testing, bug fixes, and performance optimization
wf_review_desc: Security + Performance + Code Style comprehensive review
wf_review_step1_instruction: Check common vulnerabilities: injection, XSS, CSRF, sensitive data leaks
wf_review_step2_instruction: Check performance issues: DB queries, N+1, caching, load
wf_review_step3_instruction: Check code style, readability, naming conventions, comments
wf_review_step4_instruction: Summarize all issues, categorized by severity
wf_testing_desc: Unit + Integration + E2E complete testing flow
wf_testing_step1_instruction: Write unit tests for core business logic
wf_testing_step2_instruction: Test module interactions and API integration
wf_docs_desc: API Docs + README + CHANGELOG complete documentation
wf_docs_step2_instruction: Write project README: introduction, quick start, development guide
wf_deploy_desc: Build + Test + Deploy complete CI/CD flow
wf_deploy_step1_instruction: Confirm all checks: tests pass, dependencies complete, config correct
cmd_desc_switchModel: Change the AI model for the next message

cmd_desc_review: Ask the agent to review recent code changes
cmd_desc_exportChat: Export the conversation as a Markdown file

cmd_desc_stopRun: Stop the currently running agent process

cmd_desc_setModel: Change the default model for the agent
cmd_desc_configureTools: Set allowed tools for the agent
cmd_desc_doctor: Check if agent CLIs are installed and working

multiAgent_customPlaceholder: Describe what you want to implement, e.g.: implement user authentication, order management, and payment integration modules
sched_description: Manage automated tasks that run on a schedule
sched_selectTask: Select a task to view details
schedTpl_dailyCheck_desc: Review git status, recent commits, and outstanding issues
schedTpl_dailyCheck_prompt: Review the current project state: check git status, recent commits from the past 24 hours, any failing tests, and outstanding TODO comments. Provide a brief summary of what changed and what needs attention.
schedTpl_weeklyReview_desc: Analyze code quality and suggest improvements
schedTpl_weeklyReview_prompt: Perform a code quality review: analyze recent changes for potential bugs, security issues, and style inconsistencies. Check for proper error handling, unused imports, and suggest refactoring opportunities.
schedTpl_depCheck_desc: Check for outdated or vulnerable dependencies
schedTpl_depCheck_prompt: Check project dependencies for outdated packages and known security vulnerabilities. Run npm audit or equivalent, check for major version updates, and report any critical issues that need immediate attention.
schedTpl_memoryRefresh_desc: Update project memory files with recent changes
schedTpl_memoryRefresh_prompt: Review recent project changes and update the CLAUDE.md memory files if needed. Ensure project conventions, architecture decisions, and recent patterns are documented for future reference.
schedEditor_promptPlaceholder: Describe what the agent should do when this task runs...
schedEditor_contextWarning: This prompt may depend on current conversation context. Scheduled tasks run independently — make sure the prompt is self-contained.
schedEditor_promptHint: This prompt runs without conversation context. Include workspace path, goals, output format, and constraints.
schedEditor_errorInterval: Interval must be at least 1 minute
browser_description: Control browsers, automate web tasks, and extract data
background_previewNoImage: No image — set URL or upload
background_chromeHint: Controls sidebar and main pane frost. Lower opacity shows more wallpaper; on desktop builds with a transparent window, you can see the desktop through the glass.
theme_importPlaceholder: Paste theme JSON here to import...
skillEditor_nameHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
skillEditor_markdownHint: Write your skill content in Markdown format

contextRelay_instructionsPlaceholder: Add context or instructions for the receiving session...
